---
title: "Data Mining (DM GEI - FIB)"
toc: true
number-sections: true
---

[Introducció de l'assignatura]()

# Topics

## Data Sciences Tools

[Data Sciences Tools](material/00_Introduction/DataProcessingTools.html)

## Data preparation

[Preprocessing - EDA](material/02_Preprocessing/automaticEDA.html)

[Preprocessing - Outliers detection](material/02_Preprocessing/deteccioOutliers.html)

[Preprocessing - Missing Data Treatment](material/02_Preprocessing/ImputationMethods.html)

[Preprocessing - MIMMI](https://ramia-lab.github.io/AdvancedModelling/material/01_AdvancedPreprocessing/laboratorio/03_02_MIMMI.R)

## Visualization and Dimensionality reduction

[Principal Components Analysis (ACP)](material/03_Visualitzation/ACP.html)

[Simple Correspondence Analysis (ACS)](material/03_Visualitzation/ACS.html)

[Multiple Correspondence Analysis (ACM)](material/03_Visualitzation/ACM.html)

[Factorial Analysis with Mixed Data (FAMD)](material/03_Visualitzation/FAMD.html)

## Clustering 

[Métodos de Clustering](material/04_Clustering/Clustering.html)

[Profiling](material/04_Clustering/Profiling.html)

## Predictive Models

[Lineal Regresion]()

[Logistic Regresion]()

## Asociation Rules

[Asociation Rules]()

## Decisions Trees, Bagging and Ensamble Methods

[Decisions Trees]()

[Bagging Methods]()

[Bagging Methods]()

## Discriminant models and Non Parametric Discriminant

[Naives Bayes]()

[k-Nearest Neighbour]()

[Linear Discriminant Analysis (LDA)]()

[Cuadratic Discriminant Analysis (QDA)]()

## Support Vector Machine (SVM)

[Support Vector Machine (SVM)]()

## Neuronal Networks (NN)

[Artificial Neuronal Network (ANN)]()

[Convolutional Neural Network (CNN)]()

# Bases de datos

- [Database - Sant Valentin Dates](https://ramia-lab.github.io/AdvancedModelling/material/01_AdvancedPreprocessing/laboratorio/valentine_dataset.csv)
